name: 20 MG Atorvastatin Tablets
about: 20 MG Atorvastatin Tablets are a type of general medicine used to lower cholesterol levels in the blood. These tablets come in a pack of 3*10 tablets, with each tablet containing 20 mg of Atorvastatin. The recommended dosage of these tablets should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. These tablets are manufactured in India and come in a physical form of tablets. To ensure the effectiveness of the tablets, they should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage for 20 MG Atorvastatin Tablets?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of these tablets should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.a: These tablets come in a pack of 3*10 tablets.

faq.a: These tablets come in a physical form of tablets.
